# MetricsHour

> MetricsHour is a financial intelligence platform that maps geographic revenue exposure for stocks, tracks macro data for 250 countries, and surfaces bilateral trade flows between 2,700+ country pairs. It is built for investors who want to understand where companies actually earn their money — not just what their ticker symbol says.

> Full content for AI indexing: https://metricshour.com/llms-full.txt (updated daily)

## Key Features

- [Geographic Revenue Screener](https://metricshour.com/screener/) — filter S&P 500 and global stocks by the % of revenue derived from any country (China, Europe, emerging markets, etc.)
- [Country Economy Pages](https://metricshour.com/countries/) — GDP, inflation, interest rates, trade balance, FDI, and 60+ indicators for 250 countries
- [Bilateral Trade Data](https://metricshour.com/trade/) — export/import flows between 2,700+ country pairs with top traded products
- [Stock Pages](https://metricshour.com/stocks/) — geographic revenue breakdown from SEC 10-K filings for 777 stocks including S&P 500 and China A-shares
- [Yield Curve](https://metricshour.com/yield-curve/) — live US Treasury yield curve with historical comparisons
- [Interest Rates](https://metricshour.com/rates/) — central bank policy rates and FRED macro series
- [Earnings Calendar](https://metricshour.com/earnings/) — upcoming earnings events with geographic revenue context
- [China A-Shares](https://metricshour.com/china/) — 300 Shanghai and Shenzhen listed stocks with sector and macro context
- [Blog](https://metricshour.com/blog/) — data-driven analysis on trade war exposure, geographic revenue risk, and macro trends

## Country Pages (250 total)

Format: https://metricshour.com/countries/{iso2-lowercase}

Notable examples:
- [United States](https://metricshour.com/countries/us)
- [China](https://metricshour.com/countries/cn)
- [Germany](https://metricshour.com/countries/de)
- [Japan](https://metricshour.com/countries/jp)
- [India](https://metricshour.com/countries/in)
- [Brazil](https://metricshour.com/countries/br)
- [Nigeria](https://metricshour.com/countries/ng)
- [Saudi Arabia](https://metricshour.com/countries/sa)
- [United Kingdom](https://metricshour.com/countries/gb)
- [France](https://metricshour.com/countries/fr)

## Stock Pages (777 total — US-listed + China A-shares)

Format: https://metricshour.com/stocks/{TICKER}

Notable US-listed stocks:
- [Apple (AAPL)](https://metricshour.com/stocks/AAPL) — 18.9% China revenue
- [NVIDIA (NVDA)](https://metricshour.com/stocks/NVDA) — 17% China revenue
- [Tesla (TSLA)](https://metricshour.com/stocks/TSLA) — 22% China revenue
- [Microsoft (MSFT)](https://metricshour.com/stocks/MSFT)
- [Qualcomm (QCOM)](https://metricshour.com/stocks/QCOM) — 46% China revenue
- [ExxonMobil (XOM)](https://metricshour.com/stocks/XOM)
- [Nike (NKE)](https://metricshour.com/stocks/NKE)
- [Starbucks (SBUX)](https://metricshour.com/stocks/SBUX)

Notable China A-shares (SHG/SHE):
- [Sinopec (600028)](https://metricshour.com/stocks/600028)
- [CITIC Securities (600030)](https://metricshour.com/stocks/600030)
- [China Merchants Bank (600036)](https://metricshour.com/stocks/600036)
- [Sany Heavy Industry (600031)](https://metricshour.com/stocks/600031)

## Trade Pair Pages (2,708 total)

Format: https://metricshour.com/trade/{iso2}-{iso2}

Notable examples:
- [US–China Trade](https://metricshour.com/trade/us-cn)
- [US–Mexico Trade](https://metricshour.com/trade/us-mx)
- [Germany–China Trade](https://metricshour.com/trade/de-cn)
- [China–Nigeria Trade](https://metricshour.com/trade/cn-ng)
- [US–EU Trade](https://metricshour.com/trade/us-de)

## Market Data

- [Cryptocurrencies](https://metricshour.com/crypto/) — 50 assets with OHLCV price data
- [ETFs](https://metricshour.com/etfs/) — 100 ETFs
- [FX Pairs](https://metricshour.com/fx/) — 10 major currency pairs
- [Commodities](https://metricshour.com/commodities/) — 24 commodities (energy, metals, agriculture)

## Country Groups

- [European Union](https://metricshour.com/blocs/eu)
- [G7](https://metricshour.com/blocs/g7)
- [G20](https://metricshour.com/blocs/g20)
- [BRICS](https://metricshour.com/blocs/brics)
- [ASEAN](https://metricshour.com/blocs/asean)
- [NATO](https://metricshour.com/blocs/nato)
- [OPEC](https://metricshour.com/blocs/opec)
- [OECD](https://metricshour.com/blocs/oecd)

## Blog (57 published posts)

Data-driven articles on geographic revenue risk, trade war exposure, and macro analysis.
Full list: https://metricshour.com/blog/

Selected posts:
- [US-China Tariffs Hit 145%: Which S&P 500 Stocks Have the Most to Lose](https://metricshour.com/blog/us-china-tariffs-hit-145-which-sp-500-stocks-have-the-most-to-lose)
- [Apple's $72 Billion China Problem](https://metricshour.com/blog/apples-72-billion-china-problem-more-than-just-iphone-sales-at-risk)
- [NVIDIA China Revenue Percentage (FY2024)](https://metricshour.com/blog/nvidia-china-revenue-percentage-fy2024-export-controls-and-tariff-risk-for-nvda-investors)
- [Semiconductor Stocks Ranked by China Revenue Exposure](https://metricshour.com/blog/semiconductor-stocks-ranked-by-china-revenue-exposure-a-2026-investor-guide)
- [Mexico Economy 2026: Nearshoring Boom, Risks, and What It Means for US Stocks](https://metricshour.com/blog/mexico-economy-2026-nearshoring-boom-risks-and-what-it-means-for-us-stocks)
- [Tech Stocks Most Exposed to a Europe Recession in 2026](https://metricshour.com/blog/tech-stocks-most-exposed-to-a-europe-recession-in-2026)
- [India vs Vietnam Manufacturing 2026: Which Country Wins the Supply Chain Shift?](https://metricshour.com/blog/india-vs-vietnam-manufacturing-2026-which-country-wins-the-supply-chain-shift)
- [How to Check Any Stock's Revenue by Country](https://metricshour.com/blog/how-to-check-any-stocks-revenue-by-country-and-why-it-matters-more-than-ever-in-2026)
- [BOJ Inflation Rethink: What Japan's New Price Measure Means for Rate Hikes](https://metricshour.com/blog/bank-of-japan-boj-review-the-concept-and-measurement-of-underlying-inflation)
- [Bank of England Holds at 3.75%: Sticky Services Inflation Is Delaying UK Rate Cuts](https://metricshour.com/blog/bank-of-england-bank-rate-maintained-at-375-march-2026-monetary-policy-summary-and-minutes)

## API

Machine-readable data is available via the REST API:
- Countries: https://api.metricshour.com/api/countries
- Stocks: https://api.metricshour.com/api/assets?type=stock
- Trade pairs: https://api.metricshour.com/api/trade
- Sitemap: https://api.metricshour.com/sitemap.xml
